overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a white-haired warrior exploring a dark, candle-lit gothic cathedral interior. The character walks through stone corridors with iron cages, enters a large ceremonial hall with a ritual altar, and ascends a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral antechamber with red carpet

events.description: character walks through large stone archway into darker corridor beyond

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the stone archway at the end of the room

entered.detail: large gothic stone archway with heavy wooden doors, serving as the main passage
ornate red carpet covering the stone floor of the antechamber
rough-hewn stone walls with Gothic architectural details
wall-mounted iron sconces holding lit candles providing warm light
wooden shelves with various items along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a candle-lit antechamber with red carpet and stone walls. Walking forward, they approach and pass through a large stone archway into a darker corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor with iron cage cells

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as character moves deeper into the corridor away from the antechamber

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor past iron cage structures on both sides

entered.detail: large iron-barred cages lining both sides of the corridor
thick stone support pillars between the cage cells
hanging lanterns with candles providing sparse illumination
shadowed stone walls of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with iron cages and stone pillars. Sparse candlelight casts shadows on the walls as they walk toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: large ceremonial hall with ritual altar

events.description: exits narrow corridor into expansive cathedral hall with high ceilings
warm light from dozens of altar candles brightens the scene significantly

agents.ego_description: approaching the central altar area while observing the ceremonial space and architecture

entered.detail: large stone altar with multiple tiers of burning candles and religious artifacts
rows of wooden prayer benches arranged facing the altar
tall arched stained glass window with light filtering through
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
polished stone floor reflecting the candlelight

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the character enters a vast gothic hall dominated by a candle-lit ritual altar. Wooden benches line the sides and a large window filters light from the left as the character approaches the ceremonial center.

agents.ego_description: walking past the altar and through the hall toward the staircase at the far end

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading to an upper level doorway
long wooden tables with benches along the left wall
ornate metal railings and posts near the stairs
large decorative tapestries hanging on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving past the altar, the character traverses the length of the great hall. A stone staircase becomes visible ahead, while wooden tables and wall tapestries line the sides of the chamber.

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase
character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper level wooden doorway

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron bands at the top of the stairs
close stone walls flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase, leaving the great hall behind. At the top, a heavy wooden doorway leads into a darker corridor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a small, candle-lit antechamber through a series of gothic corridors and into a vast ceremonial hall. It begins on a red carpet within a stone room, moving forward through a large archway that leads into a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with iron cages and pillars. As the character emerges from the shadows of the corridor, the space opens up into a massive gothic hall dominated by a candle-lit ritual altar and light filtering through a large side window. The camera then traverses the length of the great hall past wooden benches and wall tapestries before turning toward a stone staircase. Finally, the character ascends the stairs and passes through a heavy wooden doorway, leaving the hall behind for a darker corridor beyond.
